data.title: C & C Constructions Closes Trading Window Amid Ongoing Liquidation and Pending Results
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

C&C Constructions Ltd. ( (IN:CANDC) ) has shared an update.

C & C Constructions Ltd. has announced that its trading window for dealing in the company’s securities will remain closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives from 1 January 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of its unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended 31 December 2025. The board meeting date for approving these results will be communicated to the stock exchanges in due course, even though trading in the company’s shares remains suspended due to its ongoing liquidation, underscoring the company’s obligation to continue complying with SEBI’s insider trading regulations.

More about C&C Constructions Ltd.

C & C Constructions Limited operates in the infrastructure and construction sector, with its equity shares listed on both BSE and NSE under the symbol CANDC. The company is currently under liquidation, and trading in its shares has been suspended on both exchanges.

Current Market Cap: 60.05M INR

data.title: Kalyani Steels to Acquire 8.64% Stake in Renewable Energy SPV for Captive Power
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kalyani Steels Ltd ( (IN:KSL) ) has issued an update.

Kalyani Steels Ltd has entered into share subscription and shareholders’ agreements to acquire an 8.64% equity stake in Clean Renewable Energy KK 1A Pvt Ltd, a special purpose vehicle of Hero Rooftop Energy Pvt Ltd that is engaged in electricity generation but has yet to report operating turnover. The cash investment of Rs 5.19 crore, which is not a related-party transaction, is aimed at sourcing captive renewable power for Kalyani Steels under India’s group captive scheme, a move that is expected to support the company’s energy security, reduce power costs over time and advance its transition toward cleaner energy in line with regulatory frameworks under the Electricity Act, 2003.

More about Kalyani Steels Ltd

Kalyani Steels Ltd is an Indian steel manufacturer that supplies specialized steel products to industrial customers, notably in sectors such as automotive, engineering and allied industries. The company operates within the broader metals and materials space, where reliable and cost-effective power sourcing is a critical factor in maintaining competitiveness and operational efficiency.

Average Trading Volume: 2,059

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: 31.98B INR

An update from Hogy Medical Co ( (JP:3593) ) is now available.

Hogy Medical has amended its previously announced statement supporting a tender offer for its shares by TCG2509 Co., Ltd., to reflect that the bidder has now also entered into a tender offer agreement with Grantham, Mayo, Van Otterloo & Co. data.title: SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust to Rebrand Under State Street Name in 2026
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust ( (SPY) ).

PDR Services LLC announced that the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust will be renamed State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, effective January 26, 2026, with its trading name changing to SS SPDR S&P500 USD and its short name to SS SPDR SNP USD. The trust deed was amended on December 19, 2025, to reflect the new name and make editorial updates, but the ETF’s investment objective, focus and approach remain unchanged, and unitholdings are unaffected; an updated prospectus reflecting the new branding will be registered with the Monetary Authority of Singapore around the effective date, signaling a branding alignment rather than a shift in strategy for investors.

More about SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust

SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust is an exchange-traded fund that tracks the performance of the S&P 500 Index, offering investors broad exposure to large-cap U.S. equities. Sponsored by PDR Services LLC and associated with State Street Global Advisors, the trust is a widely used vehicle for investors seeking low-cost, index-based access to the U.S. stock market via listed units on exchanges such as the Singapore Exchange.

For an in-depth examination of SPY stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Isuzu Motors to Absorb Domestic Sales Assets from Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Streamlining Move
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Isuzu Motors ( (JP:7202) ).

Isuzu Motors Limited has approved an absorption-type company split under which it will take over shares of domestic sales companies, real estate of domestic sales bases, and related rights and obligations currently held by its wholly owned subsidiary Isuzu Motors Sales Co., Ltd., effective April 1, 2026. By centralizing ownership and management of domestic sales company shares, sales-base real estate, and related logistics and inventory functions at the parent company, Isuzu aims to streamline domestic sales operations, clarify role allocation in its Japan sales network, and improve operational efficiency without changing share capital or requiring shareholder approval, suggesting a low-disruption but structurally significant reorganization for its domestic business framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:7202) stock is a Buy with a Yen2500.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Isuzu Motors stock, see the JP:7202 Stock Forecast page.

More about Isuzu Motors

Isuzu Motors Limited is a Japan-based automotive manufacturer focused on the production and sale of vehicles, with operations centered on commercial and passenger vehicle markets. Established in 1937 and listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market, the company operates globally from its headquarters in Yokohama, Kanagawa.

Average Trading Volume: 3,028,809

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen1747B

data.description:

An announcement from TBS HOLDINGS INC. ( (JP:9401) ) is now available.

TBS HOLDINGS, INC. announced that Managing Director Shigetoshi Ida resigned effective December 25, 2025, after an internal investigation found he had fraudulently claimed reimbursements for entertainment expenses and he agreed to refund the amounts retroactively. The company characterized the misconduct as a serious breach of trust with stakeholders, issued an apology, and pledged to prevent any recurrence by further strengthening its corporate governance framework, signaling an effort to contain reputational damage and restore confidence in its management controls.

data.title: Crisil Reaffirms Finkurve’s BBB/Stable Rating as Bank Debt Limit Raised to Rs 300 Crore
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Finkurve Financial Services Ltd. ( (IN:FINKURVE) ) has issued an update.

Finkurve Financial Services Ltd has had its long-term credit rating of ‘Crisil BBB/Stable’ reaffirmed by Crisil Ratings, alongside an enhancement in the rated bank loan facilities to Rs 300 crore from Rs 200 crore and reaffirmation of ratings on two Rs 100 crore non-convertible debenture issues. The rating reflects the company’s adequate capitalisation, bolstered by a recent Rs 111.5 crore equity infusion that lifted net worth to Rs 329 crore and kept gearing at a moderate 1.1 times, as well as a comfortable earnings profile and strong promoter backing. Crisil notes that these strengths are tempered by Finkurve’s relatively small scale, limited portfolio seasoning and modest funding profile, but the reaffirmation and increased borrowing headroom support the company’s capacity to expand its gold-loan-focused franchise while maintaining a steady risk profile for lenders and debenture holders.

More about Finkurve Financial Services Ltd.

Finkurve Financial Services Ltd, which operates under the Arvog brand, is a non-banking financial company (NBFC) that focuses primarily on gold-backed lending and retail finance. Part of the Augmont bullion group, the company leverages the group’s integrated gold ecosystem to offer gold loans, personal loans and SME loans, with gold loans constituting about 91% of its Rs 671 crore assets under management as of September 30, 2025. Its operations have evolved from fintech-led retail lending partnerships to directly sourced and managed gold loans through its own branch network, supported by an experienced promoter group and professional management team.

Average Trading Volume: 9,526

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 14.67B INR

data.title: NAC to Absorb Yesmart Subsidiary in Streamlining, Brand-Unification Merger
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NAC Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9788) ) just unveiled an announcement.

NAC Co., Ltd. has decided to absorb its wholly owned subsidiary Nac Yesmart Co., Ltd., which handles the import and sale of Korean food products, through an absorption-type merger effective March 1, 2026, with NAC as the surviving entity. The move consolidates the Yesmart supermarket business—originally spun off from acquired subsidiary CONVEBOX, INC.—back into the parent to eliminate operational overlaps between NAC and Nac Yesmart, streamline group management, and unify the Yesmart brand strategy. As the transaction is a simplified and short-form merger involving a wholly owned subsidiary, no merger consideration will be paid and no shareholder meetings will be held, while NAC plans to resolve Nac Yesmart’s negative net worth via a capital increase before completion, aiming to improve economic rationality and operational efficiency in its growing Korean food retail business.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9788) stock is a Buy with a Yen603.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NAC Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:9788 Stock Forecast page.

More about NAC Co., Ltd.

NAC Co., Ltd., listed on the TSE Prime Market, operates a diversified portfolio of services including production and sale of bottled water with dispensers, rental and sale of dust control products as a Duskin franchise, pest control equipment, and consulting services for small and medium-sized enterprises. The company, founded in 1971 and headquartered in Tokyo, has a significant shareholder base including Duskin Co., Ltd. and YAMADA HOLDINGS CO., LTD., and has recently expanded into the Korean food retail segment through its Yesmart brand.

Average Trading Volume: 33,518

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen23.49B

data.title: Kanamoto Reshapes Top Management With Broad Executive Promotions and Role Realignments
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks This Holiday Season

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kanamoto Co ( (JP:9678) ) has provided an update.

Kanamoto Co., Ltd. has approved a broad set of executive personnel changes, effective January 22, 2026, pending shareholder approval at the upcoming regular general meeting. Several directors and corporate officers, including Tatsuo Kanamoto, Akira Sannomiya, Jun Watanabe, Shun Hirose, and Hideaki Yamashita, will be promoted to Director and Senior Corporate Officer roles while maintaining or expanding their responsibilities across key divisions such as steel sales, human resources, construction equipment rental, accounting, public relations, overseas business, used products sales, and group company leadership. In addition, multiple corporate officers, including those overseeing internal control, DX strategy, administration, affiliated business, and business development, will be elevated to Senior Corporate Officer positions, and a new Standing Corporate Auditor will be appointed, reflecting a consolidation of leadership and governance across Kanamoto’s domestic and overseas operations and its group companies. These moves indicate a strategic strengthening of the management structure, with a focus on reinforcing core business divisions, digital transformation, internal controls, and group coordination, which may enhance operational efficiency and support the company’s growth initiatives in its construction-related and international markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9678) stock is a Buy with a Yen4500.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kanamoto Co stock, see the JP:9678 Stock Forecast page.

More about Kanamoto Co

Kanamoto Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and the Sapporo Stock Exchange under stock code 9678. The company operates primarily in construction-related businesses, including construction equipment rental, steel sales, used equipment sales, and overseas operations, supported by affiliated companies such as Kanatech Co., Ltd., KG Flowtechno Co., Ltd., NISHIKEN CO., LTD., and Unite Co., Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 96,114

Current Market Cap: Yen148.2B
